What is Project Planning?
opts: has to plan who will work on the project, how the project will be broken down into increments, how resources will be allocated across your company, etc.
when you modify your plan in the light of experience gained and information from monitoring the progress of the work.
involves breaking down the work into parts and assign these to project team members, anticipate problems that might arise and prepare tentative solutions to those problems.
a: involves breaking down the work into parts and assign these to project team members, anticipate problems that might arise and prepare tentative solutions to those problems.
